content:

  • Manual Medical Review: Claims adjusters manually review medical materials

  • Manual Report Writing: Claims adjusters manually write reports

Critical Illness Recognition Accuracy Comparison

CriticalIllnessClaim critical illness recognition accuracy rate is 95%, while DiseaseInsurancePro manual recognition accuracy rate is 88%.

Critical Illness Insurance Claims Cycle Comparison

Recommended Choice
